details.reasoning: Complete implementation meeting all rubric requirements. INIObject.zig includes create, parse, and stringify functions with correct signatures (JSGlobalObject, JSError!, JSValue). Parse function handles sections, key=value pairs, and both ; and # comments. Proper coercion of booleans, numbers, and null values. Stringify generates proper INI format with sections as nested objects. Correct wiring in BunObject.zig via toJSLazyPropertyCallback. C++ exports header and hash table entries added. TypeScript definitions provided in both bun.d.ts and private.d.ts. Parser is self-contained without external INI imports. Code follows Zig conventions with jsc.JSFunction.create, ZigString.static, and proper imports. Comprehensive test suite covering parse/stringify functionality, edge cases, type coercion, comments, quoted strings, roundtripping, and error handling.
